meta.description: Disclosed donations to political parties (AEC detailed receipts, Donation Received only), summed per donor across the four most recent financial years. Branch returns are grouped into party families.
meta.note: Excludes public funding and electoral-commission payments. Only donations above the disclosure threshold are itemised in AEC returns.
